name: com.likeon.gas.ai
description: NPC behavior AI for Unity RPGs: time-of-day schedules drive goals, a utility-AI activity selector scores goals and runs the best one (e.g. blacksmith at 8am, shop at noon, sleep at 9pm). A component-based, GameplayTag-driven NPC behavior-AI framework for Unity. Integrates with com.likeon.gas (tags), com.likeon.gas.combat / com.likeon.gas.movement, com.unity.behavior, and bridges to com.likeon.narrative — heavier backends are optional and gated behind sub-assemblies.
